title: isodon inflexus var. transticus
intro: Isodon inflexus var. transticus, also known as the Chinese isodon or Chinese dragon plant, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Isodon inflexus var. transticus include reducing fever, relieving cough and cold, and treating digestive issues, making it a valuable remedy for various health conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and stems are typically used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
